creator: Cy.Schubert@uumail.gov.bc.ca
text:
Fvwm 2.3.8 improves on Fvwm 2.2.2, which I had a bug that caused an
annoying delay when dragging windows when running fvwm 2.2.2 on
remotely, e.g. using a slow 486 as an X server.  It also supports
GNOME.

Since Fvwm 2.3.8 is still considered beta, it is recommended that
this not replace the fvwm2 port but be named fvwm23-beta and the
fvwm2 port be renamed to fvwm22.

How-To-Repeat: 
N/A.
